title: Video by pontusboman
description:
Snatching rebounds out of the air is still one of the coolest moves in the game @patrikaman 😎

This video is from when Patrik and I coached together for the first time at @blindsave_floorball goalie camp in 2016... and I can't believe that is 10 years ago at this point.

He was already a two time world champion at this point and I was just starting out. Still, he was curious, including and interested in shared learning, so we were able to learn from each other.

Champion mentality 👑
